title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: Alex Kantrowitz interviews NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis on building AI agents safely and governably. They discuss ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist automating 90% of internal support tickets and explore enterprise deployment practices.
